# Domki Na Pniu

> Domki letniskowe nad morzem (holiday cottages by the sea) in Jarosławiec, Poland — twelve wooden cottages 800 m from the beach, for 4–6 guests. 2026 season open for bookings.

Domki Na Pniu is a small, year-round property with twelve wooden holiday cottages (52 m², two floors, private terrace, sleeps up to 6) in Jarosławiec on the Polish Baltic coast, 800 m from "Dubaj" beach and the seaside promenade. Guests are welcomed in person. On-site: seasonal pool, volleyball court, wooden gazebo, playground. Pets are welcome.

## Key pages

- [Homepage (PL)](https://domkinapniu.pl/pl): cottages, surroundings, guest reviews, booking
- [Homepage (EN)](https://domkinapniu.pl/en): English version
- [Pricing](https://domkinapniu.pl/pl/cennik): 2026 season rates, what's included, extra fees
- [FAQ](https://domkinapniu.pl/pl/faq): booking, stay, payment and pet questions
- [Gallery](https://domkinapniu.pl/pl/galeria): photos of the cottages, interiors, beach and surroundings
- [House rules](https://domkinapniu.pl/pl/regulamin): terms and conditions of the stay

## Facts

- Location: ul. Morska 11, 76-107 Jarosławiec, Poland — 800 m from the beach
- Cottages: 12, each 52 m², 2 bedrooms, sleeps 6, from 350 PLN/night (2026 season)
- Check-in / check-out: 15:00 / 10:00
- Contact: +48 506 141 730, domkinapniu@gmail.com
- Booking: by phone or via Booking.com (https://www.booking.com/hotel/pl/domki-na-pniu.pl.html)
- Rating: 8.9/10 from 82 reviews (Booking.com)
- Languages: Polish (/pl), English (/en), German (/de), Czech (/cz)
